title: Simulator: Model density-aware startup
description:
Update Python simulator to model density-aware startup behavior.

## Files to modify
- python/src/lichen/sim/ (as needed)

## Changes
1. Simulated nodes track "heard set" during startup
2. Model listen-first period before any TX
3. Apply scaled delay based on density detection
4. Ensure barrier-sync time mode handles the staggered startup correctly

## Testing
- Modify python/tests/sim/test_scale.py to verify:
  - 100-node simultaneous boot shows staggered first-TX times
  - Collision rate during startup is lower than without density-awareness
close_reason: Simulator updated with density modeling and staggered TX in barrier sync
